name: Smith Machine Calf Raise
aliases: smith one leg floor calf raise
shortDescription: A standing calf raise using a Smith machine to isolate and strengthen the calf muscles.
instructions: Stand upright under the Smith machine bar, with the bar resting across your upper traps and feet shoulder-width apart. Raise your heels to stand on your toes, contract your calves, and slowly lower back to the ground.
steps: Set up the Smith machine bar at shoulder height.
Step under the bar, position it across your upper traps, and unrack.
Stand upright with feet hip to shoulder-width apart.
Rise onto the balls of your feet by extending your ankles.
Pause at the top, then lower your heels in a controlled manner.
breathing: Exhale as you rise, inhale as you lower.
